name: boundary-engine
author: Christian Paul (https://github.com/cpauldev)
description: BoundaryEngine is a secure HTTP request boundary toolkit for TypeScript with validation, typed errors, sanitized responses, webhook guards, and request identity helpers.

scripts.test:smoke: bun -e "const mod = await import('./dist/index.js'); for (const key of ['ApiError','createErrorFactory','sanitizeError','validateJsonBody','validateQueryParams','createRouteHandler','verifyWebhookSignature','validatePayloadSize','createWebhookGuard','getClientIp']) { if (typeof mod[key] !== 'function') throw new Error('Missing export: ' + key); }"
